subcodes.first_line: The Bird of Constancy calleth from the direction of Iraq and singeth verses of separation, whereupon the hearts of them that are nigh are caused to tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا تنادی طیر الوثاق عن شطر العراق و یغن بایات الفراق و بذلک تضطرب قلوب المقربین و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
